title: Oil prices whipsaw after Trump extends ceasefire with Iran but keeps blockade in place
summary_full: Oil prices were volatile on Wednesday as uncertainty lingered over the trajectory of the U.S.-Iran conflict.
summary_public: Oil prices were volatile on Wednesday as uncertainty lingered over the trajectory of the U.S.-Iran conflict.
